title: How AI Actually Works
subtitle: From neurons to LLMs — demystifying the technology powering the AI revolution
heroTitle: How AI Actually Works

objectives.title: Understand Neural Networks
objectives.description: Visualize how neural networks learn patterns and make decisions through layers of mathematical operations.

objectives.title: Demystify LLMs
objectives.description: Understand how Large Language Models like ChatGPT are built, trained, and how they generate responses.

objectives.title: Connect to Business Value
objectives.description: Identify real-world business applications where neural networks and AI drive competitive advantage.

objectives.title: Build Your First AI Model
objectives.description: Use interactive tools to train your own classifier and experience the AI development process firsthand.

agenda.title: Part 1: The Big Picture
agenda.description: Opening hook with live AI demo, then dive into the brilliant 3Blue1Brown visual explanation of neural networks.
bulletPoints: Live demo: What happens inside ChatGPT?
Video: "But What is a Neural Network?"
Key concept: Neurons are just "things that hold numbers"

agenda.title: Part 2: Interactive Exploration
agenda.description: Hands-on learning with TensorFlow Playground and the stunning LLM Visualization tool.
bulletPoints: Explore: Why do deeper networks solve harder problems?

agenda.title: Part 3: How LLMs Are Built
agenda.description: The complete training pipeline from internet data to helpful assistant.
bulletPoints: Live coding demo in Google Colab

agenda.title: ☕ Break
agenda.description: Stretch, grab a coffee, check your messages. Let the concepts settle.

agenda.title: Part 4: Business Applications & Limitations
agenda.description: Where AI creates value — and where it fails spectacularly.

agenda.title: Part 5: Build Challenge
agenda.description: Build your own image classifier with Google's Teachable Machine.
bulletPoints: Reflect: What made it work? What didn't?

agenda.title: Part 6: Wrap-Up & Preview
agenda.description: Key takeaways, homework assignment, and what's coming next.

videos.title: 3Blue1Brown: Neural Networks
videos.description: The most intuitive visual explanation of neural networks ever created.

resources.title: TensorFlow Playground
resources.description: Play with a real neural network in your browser. Adjust neurons, layers, and watch learning happen in real-time.

resources.title: LLM Visualization
resources.description: Stunning 3D walkthrough of GPT architecture. See every layer, attention head, and matrix operation.

resources.title: Teachable Machine
resources.description: Train your own image, sound, or pose classifier with zero code. Export to use in your projects.

resources.title: Karpathy: Deep Dive into LLMs
resources.description: 3.5 hour masterclass from the former Tesla AI Director. The definitive explainer for how ChatGPT works.

resources.title: OpenAI Tokenizer
resources.description: See exactly how LLMs break text into tokens. Essential for understanding prompts and context limits.

resources.title: Google Colab
resources.description: Free cloud Python notebooks with GPU access. Write and run code without installing anything.

activities.title: TensorFlow Playground Challenge
activities.description: Navigate to playground.tensorflow.org and complete these three challenges:

steps.title: Warm-up: Circle Dataset
steps.description: Classify the circular data with just 1 hidden layer. How many neurons do you need?

steps.title: Challenge: XOR Problem
steps.description: Why does 1 layer fail on XOR? Add layers until it works. What's the minimum architecture?

steps.title: Competition: Spiral Dataset
steps.description: Race to get the lowest test loss! Screenshot your best result and architecture.

activities.title: Breaking the AI: Jagged Intelligence
activities.description: Test these prompts on ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini. Document where they fail:

codeBlock.code:
1. "How many r's are in the word 'strawberry'?"

2. "What is 47 × 38?" (Don't let it use tools)

3. "Spell 'encyclopedia' backwards"

4. "Count the number of words in: 'The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog'"

5. "Who won the Super Bowl in February 2026?"

activities.discussionNote: Discussion: Why do these fail? What does this tell us about how LLMs "think"?

activities.title: Build Your Own Classifier
activities.description: Use Teachable Machine to train a custom image classifier in 10 minutes:

steps.title: Choose 3 Objects
steps.description: Phone, notebook, pen — or anything around you. You need distinct categories.

steps.title: Collect Training Data
steps.description: Record ~30 samples per class using your webcam. Vary angles and lighting.

steps.title: Train & Test
steps.description: Click "Train Model" and test with new images. What's your accuracy?

steps.title: Reflect
steps.description: What made classification easy or hard? How would this apply to a business problem?

takeaways.text: Neural networks are mathematical functions that learn patterns from data through layers of simple operations.
LLMs predict the next token — they don't "know" things, they simulate plausible text based on patterns.
Business value = pattern recognition — recommendations, fraud detection, forecasting all use these same principles.
AI augments, not replaces — human oversight remains essential for verification and judgment.

homework.label: Watch:
homework.text: Karpathy's "Deep Dive into LLMs" — at minimum, watch 0:00-45:00 (pretraining) and 1:30:00-2:00:00 (hallucinations & psychology)

homework.label: Practice:
homework.text: Get your best score on TensorFlow Playground's spiral dataset. Screenshot your architecture and loss value.

homework.label: Think:
homework.text: Identify one business problem in your area of interest that could benefit from pattern recognition AI. Be ready to share.

nextSession.title: Session 3: Prompt Engineering & API Calls
nextSession.description: Learn the art and science of getting AI to do exactly what you want. We'll write our first API calls and build a simple AI-powered application.
